items.html: Also, when the light departs from the phase of Netzah, Netzah will be back-to-back with the upper light and face-to-face with Hod. Yesod will be face-to-back with Hod, and Malchut face-to-back with Yesod, as well. It is likewise similarly until the light departs from all ten parts of the vessel. Then, all the Sefirot will be face-to-back, the anterior of the lower one in the posterior of the upper one. However, Keter will be face-to-face with Hochma since the Keter is back-to-back with the upper light for the above reason, and therefore, Keter and Hochma must be face-to-face.
